pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x is not compatible with Java 17 as a baseline and does not support Jakarta EE namespaces required by Spring Boot 3; upgrading is necessary to run on the target stack.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 17 features and bytecode version; keeping it at 11 would result in incorrect compilation targets or runtime incompatibilities with Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the flyway-database-postgresql dependency to support Flyway 9+ modular architecture.
pom.xml.why_exists: In Flyway 9+ (used by Spring Boot 3), database-specific drivers are no longer included in flyway-core; omitting this dependency causes runtime failures when connecting to PostgreSQL.
